span.p:
Step 1: Create a wallet
save your recovery phrase

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 91) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 2: Register the name
connect wallet, search, choose years

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 91) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
On Create your profile, paste your link into
SimpleX contact (@name) or SimpleX channel (#name)

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 91) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(27, 58, 91) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 3: search or type your name
shows 'Unconfirmed name'

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(27, 58, 91) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 4: set Your SimpleX name
in your SimpleX address

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 91) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Step 4: set SimpleX name
in the channel

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 91) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 5: from another device,
search or type the name
